attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a diesel-engine leadout rider capable of setting sustained pace from distance on punchy, technical finales rather than explosive attacks.
team_tactics: Deployed for exceptionally long leadouts on uphill finishes, setting tempo from far out (7+ km) to position protected rider or control pace before finale.
terrain_preference: Punchy, technical uphill finales where sustained power matters more than explosive accelerations. Struggles when racing transitions to sharp, repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Technical uphill finales requiring repeated changes of pace or explosive accelerations. Fades when racing intensifies after leadout work complete, losing significant time in final kilometers.
key_patterns: Executes long-distance leadouts on uphill finishes, capable of setting pace 7+ km out (2 instances)
Disappears when racing requires explosive accelerations after initial tempo work (2 instances)
Lost 11+ seconds in final 7km despite leading, showing inability to match finale surges (2 instances)
Strong climbing development trajectory but racing application still maturing (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Showing climbing progression with stronger leadout capabilities, but racing execution remains inconsistent and finale weakness persists through 2023
